Objection And Petition To Determine Validity Of 2017 Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Continued To Oct-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Continued To Oct-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that this case was ordered to pro bono mediation on October 2, 2023. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Niall P. McCarthy and to Attorney Edward A. Koplowitz to appear on October 2, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Mr. McCarthy and Mr. Koplowitz to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against each one of them for failure to appear. Status on mediation, and Objection and Petition to Determine Validity of 2017 Trust Amendment are also continued to October 2, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Sae Phan. Not reported.

Objection And Petition To Determine Validity Of 2017 Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Continued To Aug-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Owais Bari appearing via zoom for William Avalos (Petitioner).
Ed Koplowitz appearing via zoom for Frank Uribe (respondent).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 11, 2023. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 18, 2023. The Ojection and petition to determine validity of 2017 trust amendment is continued to August 28, 2023, and the Parties are to return on August 28, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Choi: Not reported.

Objection And Petition To Determine Validity Of 2017 Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
